mapper.sql: id, tenant_id, policy_code, max_running_jobs_per_tenant, max_partitions_per_tenant, max_qps_per_tenant, fair_share_weight, fair_share_group, burst_limit, partition_burst_limit, quota_reset_policy, group_shared_max_running_jobs, enabled
mapper.select: select distinct tenant_id from batch.tenant_quota_policy where enabled = true
mapper.insert:
insert into batch.tenant_quota_policy ( tenant_id, policy_code, max_running_jobs_per_tenant, max_partitions_per_tenant, max_qps_per_tenant, fair_share_weight, fair_share_group, burst_limit, partition_burst_limit, quota_reset_policy, group_shared_max_running_jobs, enabled ) values ( #{tenantId}, #{policyCode}, #{maxRunningJobsPerTenant}, #{maxPartitionsPerTenant}, #{maxQpsPerTenant},
#{fairShareWeight} 1 , #{fairShareGroup}, #{burstLimit}, #{partitionBurstLimit}, #{quotaResetPolicy}, #{groupSharedMaxRunningJobs},
#{enabled} true
)
mapper.update: update batch.tenant_quota_policy set policy_code = #{policyCode}, max_running_jobs_per_tenant = #{maxRunningJobsPerTenant}, max_partitions_per_tenant = #{maxPartitionsPerTenant}, max_qps_per_tenant = #{maxQpsPerTenant}, fair_share_weight = #{fairShareWeight}, fair_share_group = #{fairShareGroup}, burst_limit = #{burstLimit}, partition_burst_limit = #{partitionBurstLimit}, quota_reset_policy = #{quotaResetPolicy}, group_shared_max_running_jobs = #{groupSharedMaxRunningJobs}, enabled = #{enabled}, updated_at = current_timestamp where id = #{id}
